# Alfa Construction Inc

> Professional painting, carpentry, siding, window & door installation, and home remodeling services across Massachusetts. Licensed (#192348) & insured contractor with 18+ years of experience serving 109 cities. 5.0/5.0 Google rating.

## Company Details

- **Legal Name:** Alfa Construction Inc
- **Trade Name:** Alfa Painting & Carpentry
- **Owner:** Fabio (Lead Contractor, 18+ years experience)
- **Founded:** 2006
- **License:** Massachusetts Construction License #192348 (valid through 04/2027)
- **Insurance:** Fully insured for residential and commercial projects
- **Phone:** (508) 596-3750
- **Email:** info@alfapaintingcarpentry.com
- **Address:** 50 Mechanic St, Bellingham, MA 02019
- **Service Area:** 109 cities across Massachusetts & Southern New Hampshire
- **Languages:** English, Portuguese
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- **Rating:** 5.0/5.0 on Google (22+ verified reviews)

## Services

- [Interior & Exterior Painting](https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/painting): Complete residential and commercial painting including surface preparation, priming, caulking, and finish coating. Benjamin Moore and Sherwin-Williams paints.
- [Carpentry & Trim Work](https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/carpentry): Custom trim, crown molding, wainscoting, door installation, deck construction, porch repairs, and structural carpentry.
- [Siding Installation & Repair](https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/siding): Hardie Plank fiber cement, vinyl siding, cedar shingles, board and batten, and complete siding replacement.
- [Window & Door Installation](https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/windows-doors): Energy-efficient window replacement, storm doors, entry doors, sliding glass doors, and bay windows.
- [Home Remodeling & Renovation](https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/remodeling): Kitchen remodeling, bathroom renovation, basement finishing, additions, and whole-home renovation.

## Service Areas (109 Cities in Massachusetts)

### Worcester County
Auburn, Bellingham, Berlin, Blackstone, Bolton, Charlton, Clinton, Douglas, Dudley, Grafton, Holden, Hopedale, Hopkinton, Leicester, Marlborough, Mendon, Milford, Millbury, Millville, Northborough, Northbridge, Oxford, Shrewsbury, Southborough, Southbridge, Spencer, Sturbridge, Sutton, Upton, Uxbridge, Webster, Westborough, Worcester
